name: convert-pdf-to-pptx
description: Convert PDF pages into PowerPoint slides. Page selection, PDF-to-image thumbnails, and PPT-to-PDF reverse conversion. Powered by PDFAPIHub.
author: PdfApiHub

apiKey.description: PDFAPIHub API key (required). Get a free key at https://pdfapihub.com. PDFs are sent to PDFAPIHub servers for conversion.
